allow: Bash(pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode acl_latex.tex > /tmp/compile3.log 2>&1 && echo "=== First pass completed ===" && bibtex acl_latex > /tmp/bibtex.log 2>&1 && echo "=== Bibtex completed ===" && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode acl_latex.tex > /tmp/compile4.log 2>&1 && echo "=== Second pass completed ===" && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode acl_latex.tex > /tmp/compile5.log 2>&1 && echo "=== Final pass completed ===" && ls -lh acl_latex.pdf)
Bash(ls -la *.tex 2>/dev/null || echo "No tex files in root")

Bash(tree -L 3 paper/ -I "*.aux|*.log|*.out|*.blg|*.fdb_latexmk|*.pdf" 2>/dev/null || find paper/ -type f ! -name "*.aux" ! -name "*.log" ! -name "*.out" ! -name "*.blg" ! -name "*.fdb_latexmk" ! -name "*.pdf" | head -50)
Bash(git lfs track "paper_data/**" && git lfs track "paper_data/**/**" && git lfs track "paper_data/**/**/**")
Bash(cd arxiv_submission/capter && for file in *.tex; do sed -i '' 's|latex/figures/|figures/|g' "$file"; sed -i '' 's|latex/table/|table/|g' "$file"; done && echo "Paths updated in chapter files")

Bash(find /Users/linghuazhang/Desktop/Project/RetailBench -name "__pycache__" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find /Users/linghuazhang/Desktop/Project/RetailBench -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "Cleaned up Python cache files")
